message:
fix(test): Fail fast on batch compilation - reduce timeout, add heartbeat

The batch compilation was hanging CI for up to 600s with no output,
making it appear frozen. This fix makes it fail fast and fail loud:

1. Reduce timeout from 600s to 120s (2 min)
   - Most batch compiles finish in <60s
   - Fail fast instead of waiting 10 minutes

2. Add heartbeat every 30s
   - Print progress to show compilation is still running
   - Prevents CI from timing out due to no output

3. Add SIGKILL escalation
   - If SIGTERM doesn't work, wait 3s then send SIGKILL
   - Ensures hung processes are forcibly terminated

Expected output on timeout:
```
Running batch compilation: zig build -j4 (timeout: 120s)...
  [batch] compiling... (30s)
  [batch] compiling... (60s)
  [batch] compiling... (90s)
  [batch] TIMEOUT after 120s - killing process
[BATCH] Killed by signal 15
```
